title: Universal Vehicle Schema v1.1.0
description: Production-quality vehicle data schema supporting BEV, PHEV, HEV, and ICE powertrains. Evolution of v1.0.0 BEV-only schema into a universal foundation for all vehicle data import.

meta.description: Metadata about the vehicle record itself, including identifiers, schema version, and audit timestamps.

vehicle_id.description: Globally unique identifier for this vehicle record. Use UUID v4 format.

schema_version.description: Semantic version of this schema definition.

powertrain_type.description: Primary powertrain classification of the vehicle.

status.description: Publication status of this vehicle record.

data_source.description: Origin of the vehicle data (e.g. OEM press release, dealer API, manual entry).

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last record update.

language_origin.description: ISO 639-1 language code of the original data source language.

identity.description: Core identity fields that uniquely describe the vehicle make, model, and physical configuration.

model_name.description: Official model name as marketed by the brand.

slug.description: URL-safe slug for the vehicle, lowercase with hyphens.

brand_slug.description: URL-safe slug for the brand only.

model_slug.description: URL-safe slug for the model only (without brand prefix).

body_type.description: Physical body style of the vehicle.

segment.description: European vehicle segment classification letter (A through F, plus S for sport and J for SUV sub-segments).

segment_common.description: Human-friendly common segment name used alongside the European letter classification.

generation.description: Internal generation or facelift identifier (e.g. 'Gen 1', 'Gen 2 Facelift').

manufacture_country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code where the vehicle is primarily manufactured.

manufacture_city.description: City where the primary manufacturing plant is located.

seats.description: Number of passenger seats including driver.

doors.description: Number of doors (excluding tailgate/trunk unless it is a hatchback-style opening).

variants.description: Array of available variants/trims for this vehicle. Each variant may differ in battery size, motor power, drivetrain, and range.

variant_id.description: Unique identifier for this variant within the vehicle record.

name.description: Marketing name of this variant/trim level.

battery_kwh.description: Usable battery capacity in kWh for this specific variant (BEV/PHEV). Null for pure ICE.

motor_power_kw.description: Total system power output in kW (combined electric + ICE for hybrids).

motor_power_hp.description: Total system power output in horsepower.

range_wltp_km.description: WLTP-rated total electric range in kilometres (BEV/PHEV).

range_cltc_km.description: CLTC-rated total electric range in kilometres (Chinese standard).

range_epa_miles.description: EPA-rated electric range in miles (US standard).

top_speed_kmh.description: Electronically limited or achieved top speed in km/h.

range_efficiency.description: Energy efficiency metrics for this specific variant. Placed per-variant as it varies significantly between trims.

wltp_kwh_per_100km.description: WLTP energy consumption in kWh per 100 km (BEV/PHEV electric mode).

cltc_kwh_per_100km.description: CLTC energy consumption in kWh per 100 km.

epa_kwh_per_100mi.description: EPA energy consumption in kWh per 100 miles.

real_world_estimate_kwh_per_100km.description: Estimated real-world energy consumption based on aggregated user data.

is_base.description: Whether this is the base (entry-level) variant.

is_featured.description: Whether this variant should be featured/highlighted in listings.

battery.description: Battery pack specifications. Required for BEV and PHEV powertrains.

capacity_gross_kwh.description: Total gross (nameplate) battery capacity in kWh.

capacity_usable_kwh.description: Usable battery capacity in kWh (net of buffer).

cell_to_body.description: Whether the battery uses cell-to-body (CTB) or cell-to-chassis integration.

thermal_management.description: Type of battery thermal management system.

warranty_km.description: Battery warranty distance limit in kilometres.

warranty_soh_percent.description: Guaranteed minimum State of Health percentage at end of battery warranty.

voltage_v.description: Nominal battery pack voltage in volts.

ice_engine.description: Internal combustion engine specifications. Required for PHEV, HEV, and ICE powertrains.

fuel_type.description: Fuel type the ICE engine uses.

max_power_kw.description: Maximum ICE engine power output in kW.

max_power_hp.description: Maximum ICE engine power output in horsepower.

max_torque_nm.description: Maximum ICE engine torque in Newton-metres.

combined_consumption_l_100km.description: Combined WLTP fuel consumption in litres per 100 km.

co2_g_km.description: Official WLTP CO2 emissions in grams per kilometre.

motor.description: Electric motor specifications. Applicable to BEV, PHEV, and HEV powertrains.

power_kw.description: Peak power output of the front motor in kW.

torque_nm.description: Peak torque of the front motor in Nm.

power_kw.description: Peak power output of the rear motor in kW.

torque_nm.description: Peak torque of the rear motor in Nm.

total_system_power_kw.description: Combined system power of all electric motors in kW.

total_system_torque_nm.description: Combined system torque of all electric motors in Nm.

top_speed_kmh.description: Electronically limited top speed in km/h.

drivetrain_base.description: Default drivetrain configuration from the electric motor layout.

torque_vectoring.description: Whether the vehicle supports electronic torque vectoring between axles or wheels.

charging.description: Charging capabilities and specifications. Required for BEV and PHEV powertrains.

dc_max_kw.description: Maximum DC fast charging power in kW.

ten_to_eighty_min.description: Time to charge from 10% to 80% SOC in minutes via DC fast charging.

five_to_eighty_min.description: Time to charge from 5% to 80% SOC in minutes via DC fast charging.

zero_to_hundred_min.description: Time to charge from 0% to 100% SOC in minutes via DC fast charging.

ac_max_kw.description: Maximum on-board AC charging power in kW.

ac_charge_time_zero_to_hundred_hours.description: Time to fully charge (0-100%) via AC in hours.

v2l.description: Vehicle-to-Load (V2L) capability for powering external devices.

max_output_kw.description: Maximum V2L output power in kW.
Maximum V2G discharge power in kW.
Maximum V2H discharge power in kW.

plug_and_charge.description: Whether ISO 15118 Plug & Charge automatic authentication is supported.

battery_preconditioning.description: Whether the vehicle supports automatic battery preconditioning when navigating to a DC charger.

dimensions.description: Physical dimensions, weight, and capacity measurements of the vehicle.

width_mm.description: Overall vehicle width excluding mirrors in millimetres.

width_with_mirrors_mm.description: Overall vehicle width including side mirrors in millimetres.

wheelbase_mm.description: Distance between front and rear axle centres in millimetres.

front_track_mm.description: Front axle track width in millimetres.

rear_track_mm.description: Rear axle track width in millimetres.

trunk_volume_l.description: Trunk/boot cargo volume in litres (seats up).

trunk_max_volume_l.description: Maximum cargo volume in litres with rear seats folded.

frunk_volume_l.description: Front trunk (frunk) volume in litres. 0 if no frunk.

gross_weight_kg.description: Gross vehicle weight rating (GVWR) in kilograms.

towing_capacity_braked_kg.description: Maximum braked towing capacity in kilograms. 0 if not rated for towing.

towing_capacity_unbraked_kg.description: Maximum unbraked towing capacity in kilograms.

roof_load_kg.description: Maximum static roof load in kilograms.

turning_circle_m.description: Kerb-to-kerb turning circle diameter in metres.

safety.description: Safety ratings, certifications, airbag configuration, and driver assistance systems.

year_tested.description: Year the Euro NCAP test was conducted.

adult_occupant_percent.description: Adult occupant protection score as percentage.

child_occupant_percent.description: Child occupant protection score as percentage.

vulnerable_road_users_percent.description: Vulnerable road users (pedestrian/cyclist) protection score as percentage.

safety_assist_percent.description: Safety assist systems score as percentage.

adas_standard.description: Advanced Driver Assistance Systems included as standard equipment.

adas_optional.description: Advanced Driver Assistance Systems available as optional extras or paid upgrades.

torsional_stiffness_nm_deg.description: Body torsional stiffness in Nm/degree (if published by OEM).

isofix_points.description: Number of ISOFIX child seat anchor points.

touchscreen.description: Whether the screen is a touchscreen.

passenger_screen.description: Dedicated front passenger entertainment screen (if present).

rear_entertainment_screens.description: Number of rear passenger entertainment screens.

size_inches.description: Virtual image diagonal equivalent in inches.

ota_updates.description: Whether the vehicle supports over-the-air software updates.

wireless_phone_charging.description: Whether Qi wireless phone charging pad is available.

wireless_charging_wattage.description: Maximum Qi wireless charging power in watts.

power_watts.description: Total audio system power output in watts.

adaptive_high_beam.description: Whether adaptive/glare-free high beam assist is available.

light_bar.description: Whether a continuous light bar (front or rear) is present.

electrochromic.description: Whether the glass roof has electrochromic (smart glass) tinting.

autonomous_level.description: Highest SAE autonomous driving level supported (hardware-capable or software-enabled).

sim_type.description: SIM card type for cellular connectivity.

wifi_hotspot.description: Whether built-in Wi-Fi hotspot is available.

usb_ports.description: Total number of USB ports (all types).

heat_pump.description: Whether a heat pump is used for cabin heating (improves efficiency in cold weather).

pre_conditioning.description: Whether remote/scheduled cabin pre-conditioning is supported.

pm25_filter.description: Whether a PM2.5 particulate filter is fitted.

fragrance_system.description: Whether a built-in fragrance/aroma diffuser is available.

ventilated_front_seats.description: Whether front seats have active ventilation/cooling.

ventilated_rear_seats.description: Whether rear seats have active ventilation/cooling.

massage_front_seats.description: Whether front seats have massage function.

massage_rear_seats.description: Whether rear seats have massage function.

heated_steering_wheel.description: Whether the steering wheel is heated.

power_front_seats.description: Power adjustment capability for front seats.

seat_adjustment_ways_driver.description: Number of power adjustment directions for the driver seat.

rear_seat_recline.description: Whether the rear seats can recline.

privacy_glass.description: Whether factory privacy (tinted) glass is fitted on rear windows.

power_tailgate.description: Whether an electrically operated tailgate is fitted.

soft_close_doors.description: Whether soft-close door mechanisms are fitted.

adaptive_damping.description: Whether electronically adjustable (adaptive) dampers are fitted.

air_suspension.description: Whether air suspension (ride height adjustable) is fitted.

ride_height_adjustable_mm.description: Total ride height adjustment range in millimetres (if air suspension).

max_angle_degrees.description: Maximum rear wheel steering angle in degrees.

standard_size_inches.description: Standard (base) wheel rim diameter in inches.

optional_sizes_inches.description: Available optional wheel rim diameters in inches.

tire_size_standard.description: Standard tyre size designation (width/aspect ratio R diameter).

hex.description: Approximate hex colour code for UI rendering.

surcharge_eur.description: Additional cost for this color option in EUR. 0 for standard/included colors.

is_standard.description: Whether this is the no-cost standard color.

warranty.description: Warranty coverage details for the vehicle, battery, and paint.

vehicle_years.description: General vehicle warranty duration in years.

vehicle_km.description: General vehicle warranty distance limit in kilometres.

battery_years.description: High-voltage battery warranty duration in years.

battery_km.description: High-voltage battery warranty distance limit in kilometres.

battery_soh_percent.description: Minimum guaranteed State of Health (SOH) at end of battery warranty period.

roadside_assistance_years.description: Complimentary roadside assistance duration in years.

transferable.description: Whether the warranty is transferable to subsequent owners.

markets.description: Market availability, pricing, regulatory approvals, incentives, and service network.

available_in.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes where the vehicle is officially sold.

eu_type_approval.description: EU Whole Vehicle Type Approval (WVTA) details.

approved.description: Whether EU type approval has been granted.

approval_date.description: Date of type approval in ISO 8601 format.

base_price.description: Base MSRP including applicable taxes (e.g. VAT) in the local currency.

variant_id.description: Reference to the variant this price applies to. If omitted, applies to the base variant.

price_includes_vat.description: Whether the base_price includes VAT/sales tax.

effective_date.description: Date from which this price is effective.

incentives.description: Government or regional purchase incentives applicable to this vehicle.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code where the incentive applies.

region.description: Sub-national region or state if the incentive is regional.

name.description: Official name of the incentive programme.

amount.description: Monetary value of the incentive in local currency (0 for non-monetary benefits).

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the incentive amount.

valid_until.description: Expiry date of the incentive programme.

examples: Max MSRP EUR 65,000. Private buyers only.

import_tariff.description: Import tariff information for markets where the vehicle is imported.

eu_tariff_percent.description: Current EU import tariff rate as percentage.

us_tariff_percent.description: Current US import tariff rate as percentage.

notes.description: Additional context about tariff status or pending changes.
examples: EU provisional countervailing duty effective 2024-07-04. Under review.

service_network.description: Service and after-sales network presence by country.

service_center_count.description: Number of authorised service centres (may overlap with dealers).

mobile_service.description: Whether mobile/at-home service is available in this market.

service_partner.description: Name of third-party service partner (if applicable).

media.description: Media assets including images, videos, and brochures.

hero_image.description: URL of the primary hero/marketing image.

images.description: Collection of vehicle images with multilingual alt text.

url.description: Absolute URL to the image file.

alt.description: Multilingual alt text object. Keys are ISO 639-1 language codes, values are the localised alt text strings.

additionalProperties.description: Alt text in the specified language.

examples.en: BYD Seal exterior front three-quarter view in Aurora Green
examples.de: BYD Seal Aussenansicht vorne dreiviertel in Aurora Gruen

category.description: Image category for filtering and display.

video_urls.description: URLs to promotional or review videos.

brochure_urls.description: URLs to downloadable PDF brochures by locale.

language.description: ISO 639-1 language code of this brochure.

content.description: Multilingual marketing content and SEO metadata. Keyed by ISO 639-1 language code.

additionalProperties.description: Localised content for a specific language.

description_short.description: Short description for listing cards (max 200 characters).
examples: The BYD Seal is a sleek electric sedan built on the e-Platform 3.0, offering up to 570 km WLTP range.

key_selling_points.description: Ordered list of key selling points for marketing materials.

examples: BYD Seal 2026 - Price, Range, Specs | ChinaCar
Discover the 2026 BYD Seal: up to 570 km range, Blade Battery, from EUR 44,990. Full specs, pricing and availability in Europe.

comparisons.description: Competitive comparison references and industry recognition.

competitor_models.description: List of direct competitor vehicle references for comparison features.

vehicle_id.description: Optional reference to the competitor's vehicle_id if it exists in our database.

changelog.description: Audit trail of significant data changes to this vehicle record.

date.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the change was made.

field.description: JSON path of the changed field (dot notation).

old_value.description: Previous value before the change. Null for newly added fields.

updated_by.description: Identifier of the person or system that made the change.
